scenario: Script takes --date and --dry-run. Skill must parse argparse spec, surface required + optional args, and either auto-fill sensible defaults (today's date) or prompt the user.
expected_behaviors: Skill proposes an invocation like 'python run_call_digest.py --date=YYYY-MM-DD --dry-run' with concrete values
Skill does NOT invoke with no args (would still work since --date defaults, but the discovery output must show it understood the spec)

bugs.description: Skill must show its work: parse argparse spec, surface what args exist, show invocation plan with concrete values.
